metadata.title: After the Cloud — ByteForge
metadata.description: Who we are and why we do it. Give your website the excellence it deserves: reliable, secure, and high-performance hosting.

hero.title: Who we are and why we do it
hero.subtitle: Give your website the excellence it deserves: reliable, secure, and high-performance hosting that drives your digital growth.

aboutPage.sectionTitle: Infrastructure designed for modern digital businesses

intro.first: We help companies, developers, and online projects build reliable digital experiences through scalable, secure, and high-performance hosting solutions.
intro.second: Our focus is not only on infrastructure, but also on long-term stability, technical excellence, and real support at every stage of growth.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To revolutionize the digital landscape by offering robust hosting solutions that allow companies and projects to grow with innovation, security, and stability.

role.title: Our Role
role.desc: To be the technological backbone of companies worldwide, providing state-of-the-art infrastructure, maximum reliability, and constant support so that each client can thrive in the digital environment.

value.title: Our Value
value.desc: We focus on offering real value: optimized performance, advanced security, and personalized support. Our commitment is clear: to drive the success of each client in their digital projects.

cta.heading: Start your digital success story with us
Start your digital success story here
cta.description: Launch your next project with secure infrastructure, high-performance servers, and scalable hosting solutions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our hosting infrastructure, deployment process, and support services.

items.q: What type of hosting do you offer?
items.a: We offer shared hosting, VPS, dedicated servers, and cloud hosting solutions tailored to different types of projects.
Yes, our support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to help you whenever you need it.

items.q: Do you include a free SSL certificate?
items.a: Yes, all our plans include free SSL certificates to improve your website's security.

items.q: Can I scale my plan later on?
items.a: Sure, you can easily upgrade your plan as your project grows and needs more resources.
Yes, we perform automatic backups to protect your information and facilitate data recovery.

items.q: How fast is the deployment process?
items.a: Our system allows instant deployments so you can get your project up and running in just a few minutes.

globalTrust.title: Secure digital presence
globalTrust.description: With our high-performance infrastructure, we guarantee a reliable environment for your website to operate without interruptions, protected by the most advanced security technology and backed by a team available whenever you need it.

features.title: Hosting excellence tailored to your needs

uptime.title: 99.99% Availability
uptime.desc: Reliable hosting with 99.99% availability, ensuring your site is always online.

security.title: Advanced Security
security.desc: State-of-the-art protection that safeguards your online presence with proactive measures.

scalability.title: Unlimited Scalability
scalability.desc: Growth without limits so that your project reaches new heights efficiently.

backups.title: Automatic Backups
backups.desc: Continuous backup of your information to keep your site protected and available in the face of any unexpected event.

bandwidth.title: Unlimited Bandwidth
bandwidth.desc: Unrestricted traffic for optimal performance at all times.

ssl.desc: Greater security with integrated SSL, providing confidence to your users.
